queries.question: What is the profit per operation and when did that operation occur?
queries.sql: SELECT OperationID, (Revenue - Expenses) AS Profit, OperationYears FROM Operations
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?operationid ?calc ?operationyears WHERE {
  ?operations a :Operations .
  ?operations p:OperationID ?operationid .
  ?operations p:Revenue ?revenue_n .
  ?operations p:Expenses ?expenses_n .
  BIND(((xsd:double(?revenue_n) - xsd:double(?expenses_n))) AS ?calc)
  ?operations p:OperationYears ?operationyears .
}

queries.question: For each operation, list its average revenue and the months it took place.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(Revenue) AS AverageRevenuePerOperation, OperationMonths FROM Operations
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
SELECT (AVG(?rev) AS ?avg) ?om WHERE { ?o a :Operations ; p:OperationID ?oid ; p:OperationMonths ?om ; p:Revenue ?rev } GROUP BY ?oid ?om
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold omits GROUP BY; NL = per-operation avg revenue + months

queries.question: For each operation, list its average revenue and the years and months it took place.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(Revenue) AS AverageRevenuePerOperation, OperationYears, OperationMonths FROM Operations
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
SELECT (AVG(?rev) AS ?avg) ?oy ?om WHERE { ?o a :Operations ; p:OperationID ?oid ; p:OperationYears ?oy ; p:OperationMonths ?om ; p:Revenue ?rev } GROUP BY ?oid ?oy ?om
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold omits GROUP BY; NL = per-operation avg revenue + years + months
